headline: MARKET WRAP — May 16
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 16, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Today's session crystallized a clear risk-off pivot as Asian markets led a broad retreat while metals suffered their worst selloff in months. Energy's lone resilience highlighted divergent commodity dynamics, but the volatility spike and crypto outflows painted a picture of growing investor caution. Tomorrow's focus shifts to whether this defensive rotation gains momentum or proves a temporary setback. CLOSING PRICES SPY -0.4% | QQQ -0.8% | VIX +6.8% | TLT -1.3% | DXY +0.4% | OIL flat vs MORNING SPY -0.8% | QQQ -0.7% | TLT -0.1% EVENING NEWS ▼ Latest Inflation Report: What It Could Mean For Bitcoin, Ethereum, And Solana Ahead ▲ Precious metals plunge on U.S. inflation fears, rising Treasury yields ▲ Dollar Rallies as Inflation Risks Push Bond Yields Higher ▲ Japan: Energy shock lifts inflation more than GDP – ING ▲ Forecasting the upcoming week: Markets shift focus to PMIs and central bank events SCENARIO SHIFTS ↑ Late Cycle · ↑ Recession · ↓↓ Goldilocks · ↑ Stagflation REGIME CHECK Risk Gauge: 13.8/100 (Calm). Phase: OVERHEATING. SECTOR CLOSE Top sectors: XLE +3.1%, XLF +0.2%, URA -6.3%, COPX -9.6%. Sector dispersion: 71 (EXTREME, breadth SELECTIVE_WEAKNESS), 25% positive 1w.
